toast.quit.detail: You can't quit the OS that easily.

settings.desktop.customHint: Choose an image from your device.
settings.system.resetDesc: Clears all preferences and restarts the OS as if it were your first visit.

projects.marcos.description: Interactive macOS-style portfolio built with Angular 21, PrimeNG and Tailwind CSS. Animated dock, functional terminal, finder and photo gallery.
projects.project2.description: Analytics dashboard with real-time charts, paginated data tables and reactive state management via Angular Signals.
projects.project3.description: Scalable RESTful API with Express, MongoDB, JWT authentication and automated Swagger documentation.

terminal.welcome: Welcome to MarcOS Terminal — type 'help' for available commands

welcome.title: Welcome to marcOS
welcome.subtitle: Marc-Antoine Muggeo's Portfolio
welcome.intro: You're exploring an interactive portfolio that mimics the experience of a macOS operating system. Each application holds content about my background, projects, and how to get in touch.
welcome.tip.dock: The Dock at the bottom — click icons to open apps
welcome.tip.topbar: The top bar — system menus and shortcuts
